compiled_state.title: Create plugins/dso/README.md with DSO NextJS Starter section
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
testing_mode: GREEN

Create plugins/dso/README.md with a DSO NextJS Starter section. CRITICAL CONSTRAINT: the file is under plugins/dso/ and check-plugin-self-ref.sh blocks any file there containing the literal string 'plugins/dso'. The README must NOT include the full GitHub raw URL (which contains /plugins/dso/scripts/...). Instead, describe the tool conceptually and refer readers to docs/onboarding.md for the full command.

Required content (no 'plugins/dso' literal substring):
  ## DSO NextJS Starter
  A one-command bootstrap for non-engineer NextJS prototyping. See [docs/onboarding.md](../../docs/onboarding.md) for the full bootstrap invocation.

TDD exemption: GREEN phase — makes RED tests test_readme_exists and test_readme_has_nextjs_starter_section (from dependency task f949-c432) pass. Criterion: GREEN implementation task.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Verify: test -f plugins/dso/README.md
- Verify: grep -qiE 'nextjs-starter|NextJS Starter' plugins/dso/README.md
- Verify: ! grep -q 'plugins/dso' plugins/dso/README.md
- Verify: bash tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh test_readme_exists
- Verify: bash tests/skills/test-nextjs-starter-docs.sh test_readme_has_nextjs_starter_section
